given: a user submits the form with title "Login button broken" and description "Users cannot click the login button on mobile devices"
then: a bug is created in the system with title "Login button broken" and description "Users cannot click the login button on mobile devices"
architectural_notes: E2E AC verifying end-to-end form submission creates a bug in the database with submitted data. The bug service application layer owns the create-bug business logic (validation, persistence). Audit logging of bug creation is a cross-cutting concern owned by the application layer.
